# Column 9-14: Average orientation (h k l)[u v w] in integers. i and t missing from (hkil)[uvtw] if hexagonal or trigonal. All 0s for anti-grains)
# Column 15-20: Average orientation (h k l)[u v w] in floats. i and t missing from (hkil)[uvtw] if hexagonal or trigonal. All 0s for anti-grains)
# Column 21-22: Average Position (x, y) in microns
